channel.title: Archive on My New Hugo Project
channel.description: Recent content in Archive on My New Hugo Project

item.title: Hydra 83
item.description:
One board. Two protocols. More to come.

What Is It?#

The Hydra 83 is a custom 83-key mechanical keyboard that can switch between USB HID and PS/2 via a hardware toggle. The name comes from two things:

  • 83 — the total key count
  • Hydra — the multi-headed creature of myth, representing the board’s ability to switch between protocols. In PS/2 mode it’s a standard PS/2 keyboard; in USB mode it’s a USB keyboard that also accepts a PS/2 mouse on the PS/2 connector

The Hydra is intended to be a series. Future versions may add an integrated USB hub, additional protocol modes, or other switching features.

item.title: TODO
item.description:
• make it sound more natural meaning not have like the solution but make it obvious to the person when reading it normally it’ll make them feel smart for figuring it out and also not really “force feed” them the information.
  • add functional depression maybe show people the differences between functional depression and a meaningful ambition.
  • maybe also talk about suicide?
  • what the drugs actually do; there was an article about someone who took antidepressant drugs (or was it a different drug that would make him stop with his addiction?) back in the 90s and he saw the world in black and white and also didn’t only stop with one addiction but stopped with all his addictions note I might be confusing a couple essays here but talk about the temporary side effects of antidepressant drugs and how they basically turn off parts of your brain and practically kill living
  • depressed people don’t see any point in their life and they ask themselves why live ~Jordan Peterson
  • finding meaning through responsibility not happiness ~Jordan Peterson
  • at reference to the book lost connections by Johann hari
  • no statistics because you can easily lie with statistics let’s just go on ideas and what actually works which means we should probably get rid of the whole heritability estimates. Edit: and the all meet diet as the solution to the inheritance problem instead and maybe keep the inheritance problem
  • antidepressants are not the fix: the horrifying side effect (akathisia) also these medications are dependents forming https://youtu.be/o9bzpDogoeo, also talk about mitochondrial health being a variable
  • “become the person you want to be”
  • theory: could psychedelics help reset the brain from depression?
  • https://youtu.be/KexVIxCpEmA: this can go into wrong environment but it could also go with symptoms like energy lowers and submission increases
  • I need to fact-check this, but I think twin competition and most likely sibling competition, but we’ll call it twin competition. This could go somewhat into um maybe the common half-truths in a sense, where there’s one who just brings down the other, and maybe even sometimes even the other one is depressed. And that could just be like, maybe they have so much um pressure on them to do, to be, let’s just say smart in that sense, instead of actually look at all the stuff. Or maybe it could be for other reasons, like maybe it could be from multiple variables, from pressure to doing something that they don’t want to do, to maybe back again to like drugs, because that could also be another variable.

Table of Contents#

  • [[# Why This Matters?|Why This Matters?]]
  • [[#The Common-Sense Half-Truth|The Common-Sense Half-Truth]]
  • [[#Depression as a Byproduct of Modernity|Depression as a Byproduct of Modernity]]
  • [[#The Overload and the Illusion|The Overload and the Illusion]]
  • [[#The Infectious Cry and the Call to Metamorphosis|The Infectious Cry and the Call to Metamorphosis]]
  • [[#Political Ideology as Modernity’s Amplifier|Political Ideology as Modernity’s Amplifier]]
  • [[#The Cure – Reclaiming Meaning in a Meaningless World|The Cure]]

Why This Matters?#

It feels like almost everyone I know carries some version of it—persistent low energy, a quiet fog, or that deeper sense that nothing quite matters the way it once did. Friends push through their days on autopilot and mention it in passing. Many have tried therapy or medication, yet the symptoms linger or return. The question isn’t just “why is this happening?” but why so few seem to find a lasting way out.

item.title: TODO
item.description:
• add VPS for when jamming

Project LOCUST#

Localized Operation and Coordination Unit for Swarm Tactics — LOCUST

Overview#

A military-grade drone swarm system built around two drone types, purpose-built for reconnaissance, surveillance, tunnel/underground operations, and target tracking. Optimized for anti-terrorism and hostile-environment field use.

  • Async drones (×4, belt-worn + backpack auto-launch) — full sensor suite, independently capable, used for recon, tunnel ops, dark environments, through-wall sensing, object deployment, and directed surveillance.
  • Sync drones (×12, suitcase) — vision-first, centrally coordinated, used for perimeter coverage, formation surveillance sweeps, multi-angle subject lock, and distributed CSI sensing mesh.

Both fleets connect to a computer backpack worn by the operator. The backpack features a motorized auto-launch rack that flips up on command and deploys async drones automatically — no manual handling needed. A head-mounted display (HMD) shows drone feeds and controls. Motion gloves (or Quest 3 hand tracking) allow precision manual control. Solar panels on the suitcase and backpack extend field endurance without shore power.

item.title: Drone Swarm Project — Design Notes v3.1
item.description:
Localized Operation and Coordination Unit for Swarm Tactics — LOCUST

TODO#

Okay, so this will be more military-based instead of for commercial use cases.

  1. Backpack installed drone with a good camera night vision and thermal imaging and strong connection so you can scan tunnels and shit (Meaning, instead of having it built warm for charging, it should be probably on the backpack for comfortability. Or maybe we could also have just extra ones on the backpack. We should also make it that the backpack has a motor that will, like, flip up so that the drones can go on, like, take off automatically)
  2. add also a holder for that can release an object with a command.
  3. More military-grade equipment, meaning, upgrade cameras instead of them being those cheap ones to be better quality, that can do dual mode for all cameras, and maybe even, like, for dual mode, um, meaning, seeing in the dark and, like, night vision and regular vision. Maybe I’ll end up, we’ll have to get an extra camera that will be able to do on all the drones, uh, heat signature mapping. And, uh, yeah, once again, military-grade equipment, not, uh, cheap stuff. I can’t have this fail on me.
  4. Add suicide capability. (meaning for async and synchronous drones, meaning that you can just independently assign each drone a target, and well, the rest is history.)

Synchronous Drones (Sync)#

Role: Surrounding the perimeter of the building while maintaining formation.

item.title: Everyone's Depressed; Why Modernity Leads to Depression (And What Actually Fixes It) V0.2
item.description:
Table of Contents#

  • [[#Thesis|Thesis]]
  • [[#The Common-Sense Half-Truth|The Common-Sense Half-Truth]]
  • [[#Depression as a Byproduct of Modernity|Depression as a Byproduct of Modernity]]
  • [[#The Overload and the Illusion|The Overload and the Illusion]]
  • [[#The Infectious Cry and the Call to Metamorphosis|The Infectious Cry and the Call to Metamorphosis]]
  • [[#Political Ideology as Modernity’s Amplifier|Political Ideology as Modernity’s Amplifier]]
  • [[#The Cure – Reclaiming Meaning in a Meaningless World|The Cure]]

Thesis#

None of this is made up. I’m not a conspiracy theorist—I’m an audio mixer. I took the raw tracks (peer-reviewed studies, large surveys like Gallup and CES, Jung, real-world data) and blended them so they make sense together. This is a thesis: modernity stripped away meaning, purpose, and real connections, then sold us distractions, pills, and ideologies as fixes. The evidence is out there; I’m just relaying and mixing it for clarity. It will sound like common sense once you see the pattern, that’s the point.

item.title: **Table of Contents**
item.description:
• Thesis / Author’s Note
  • Chapter 1: Isn’t It Just a Chemical Imbalance or Genetics? (The Common-Sense Half-Truth)
  • Chapter 2: Depression as a Byproduct of Modernity
  • Chapter 3: The Overload and the Illusion (You’re Seeing Too Much + It’s All an Illusion)
  • Chapter 4: The Infectious Cry and the Call to Metamorphosis
  • Chapter 5: Political Ideology as Modernity’s Amplifier
  • Chapter 6: The Cure – Reclaiming Meaning in a Meaningless World
  • Glossary
  • References (sources listed by chapter for easy checking)

Title: Everyone’s Depressed: Why Modernity Leads to Depression (And What Actually Fixes It)

item.title: Everyone's Depressed (Why Modernity Leads to Depression) V0
item.description:
Focus: Pulls the depressed cult/suicidal empathy + identity crisis material (including trans stats + Talmud clarification) and fully integrates all your new bullets. Short, punchy title as requested. This stands related but separate — it explains the personal/psychological fallout of the “infective thinking” from the series.

Key Content / Chapters (short sections, easy to read or thread):

  • Depression as a Byproduct of Modernity Rates are historically high: U.S. adult depression ~18%+ in 2024–2025 (Gallup), with youth under 30 doubling since 2017 to ~27%. Adolescents show even higher symptoms. Not normal — modernity’s rapid changes (social media, disconnection, loss of traditional anchors) amplify it.
  • Depression as Consumerism / The Chemical Imbalance Myth Consumer culture promises fulfillment through acquisition and distraction but delivers emptiness — a “philosophy of futility.” The “chemical imbalance” (e.g., low serotonin) theory is a myth: major 2022+ reviews (UCL/Moncrieff et al.) found no convincing evidence linking depression to simple neurotransmitter deficits. It’s oversold, often by providers or pharma history, but reality is more complex (environment, meaning, lifestyle).
  • Genetics: Predisposition, Not Destiny (The Partial Excuse): Twin/adoption data show ~37% heritability for MDD—no single gene, just thousands of tiny variants (PRS explains <6% of variance so far). Depressed parents raise kids’ risk 2–3x via both genes and environment (rearing stress, modeling). But rates have doubled in youth since 2010 while genes haven’t changed—proving modernity (disconnection, overload, meaning vacuum) is the real accelerator. “It’s genetics” is sometimes a cop-out; the surge demands we fix the environment, not just pop pills that don’t target a proven “imbalance.”
  • Wrong Person, Wrong Environment (School System) Many are mismatched: sensitive souls in rigid, ideologically charged modern schools that prioritize feelings over resilience, or high-stimulation environments without real community/purpose. This breeds chronic stress and disconnection.
  • Do Cities (and Overcrowding) Cause Depression? (The Urban Environment Question): Yes—in developed countries, urban density links to ~30% higher depression odds via noise, pollution, fragmentation, and overcrowding (worst for low-income). It’s modernity’s “wrong environment” on steroids: too many people, too little space or green. Rural flips sometimes due to care gaps, but cities amplify the epidemic. Solution? Don’t just flee to suburbs (great if you can)—redesign cities with parks, community hubs, and lower-density living. Or choose your environment intentionally while building tradition and purpose anywhere. Fix the setting; don’t medicate the symptom.
  • A Sign of Metamorphosis (Carl Jung) Jung viewed depression not always as pure pathology but often as a catalyst for individuation — turning inward, confronting the unconscious, and renewing the personality. It can foreshadow growth or creative burst if engaged. The hidden price of resisting: sunk cost fallacy in clinging to an outdated identity or life path that no longer fits.
  • Is It Mislabeled as Distraction? (You’re Seeing Too Much) Constant input (news, social media, notifications) overwhelms — what feels like “depression” may partly be overload or hyper-awareness of a chaotic world. Not just distraction; it’s information sickness.
  • Searching for Meaning in a Meaningless World Modernity strips traditional sources of purpose (community, tradition, transcendence), leaving an “existential vacuum.” Consumerism and pleasure fill the gap poorly, fueling the mass neurotic triad (aggression, addiction, depression).
  • Is It All an Illusion? (Feelings and Thoughts as a River) Thoughts and feelings flow like a river — you can observe and choose what to engage, but they aren’t “you.” The modern identity crisis (fluid self-ID as paramount) amplifies this: “just pick and choose your identity.” Caution — choices can backstab if detached from biology, reality, or consequences. (Ties to series: “1% transgender as normal” misrepresents surge/contagion; Talmud “six genders” are rare biological edge cases for halakha, not self-ID spectrum.)
  • Does Media (Romance Movies, Social Media) Make Lonely People Depressed? (The Comparison Trap Question): Absolutely—lonely folks watch romance or “perfect” lives for escape, but it triggers social comparison (“why don’t I have that?”), deepening the vacuum and addictive “powerless” feeling. (Music hint: melancholic tracks can loop rumination or feel addictive, but they also process sadness as a signal—like Jung’s metamorphosis—if you don’t become the emotion.) For emotional thinkers (women, liberal teens where rates hit hardest): feelings aren’t “you”—observe them like a river, then choose real-world action over screens. Solution? Curate or cut consumption; seek face-to-face connections and purpose. Use sadness as fuel for growth, not identity. Depression isn’t the end—it’s a call to fill the meaning gap.
  • It’s Infectious + It’s a Cry for Meaning Depressive thinking spreads via social networks and culture (infective empathy loops). At root, it’s often a cry for meaning in a world that offers none. Effective response: turn toward purpose, tradition, real connections — not endless affirmation or chemical fixes.
  • Political Ideology as Modernity’s Amplifier: US data shows liberals report 2–3x higher depression/poor mental health than conservatives (2022–2025 surveys: liberals average 53/100 mental health vs. conservatives’ 68). The gap widened post-2010 among youth, especially progressive girls. Not genetics alone (ideology ~50% heritable, but rates exploded while genes stayed fixed). Progressive focus on systemic chaos + social media contagion turns modernity’s meaning vacuum into a personal crisis. Conservatives’ emphasis on agency/tradition buffers it. Post-election swings prove it’s partly situational—but the baseline favors the right. This isn’t moralizing; it’s data showing how “infective thinking” hits harder on the left in a disconnected world.
  • Does Depression Pull People Left? (The Reverse Causality Question): Yes—longitudinal data show poor mental health and early distress predict shifts toward liberalism, not the other way around. Vulnerable kids (trauma, poor health, high neuroticism) become liberal adults; distress precedes “system-blaming” views, especially in girls post-2010. It’s a loop: modernity creates the vulnerability → people seek meaning in progressive empathy/identity → overload and vacuum worsen symptoms. Conservatism isn’t “coping” or denial—it’s protective factors (tradition, agency) that reduce the cry for meaning. Depression is real, but the epidemic isn’t politics—it’s the meaningless world pulling the vulnerable into amplifying ideologies. Turn toward purpose, not ideology or pills.
  • Does Losing an Election (or Politics Itself) Cause Depression? (The Post-Election Shift Question): Post-2024 data shows the losing side (Democrats) saw real drops in well-being, optimism, and control that lasted months—not just “sour grapes,” but identity fusion: politics now is self, turning every win/loss into existential crisis. Both sides get pissed because it’s invaded bedrooms, homes, and meaning. Solution? Depoliticize the personal—government handles roads and rules; keep private life private. Curate news (less overload), focus on local purpose and real connections. This isn’t denial; it’s reclaiming your life from modernity’s identity trap. Depression here is a cry for meaning beyond the circus.

Cross-reference (light): “This personal fallout mirrors the societal infective thinking in the ‘Infectious Disease’ series.”

item.title: Happiness Over Meaning, Pleasure as an Ultimate Goal, and the Acceptance of Degeneracy
item.description: “Studies show kids of LGBT parents turn out statistically better!"—pushed via activist reviews/small convenience samples of stable couples. Large-scale evidence contradicts. Mark Regnerus’ 2012 New Family Structures Study (nationally representative) found children of parents with same-sex relationships worse off on numerous outcomes vs. intact biological mother-father homes. A 2025 Cornell multiverse analysis tested over 2 million analytic variations on the data — every single model confirmed the “LGBT effect”: kids fare worse (or at best no better) with LGBT parents than intact bio parents. Biological two-parent homes remain optimal per decades of sociology; the “better” narrative is ideology overriding evidence.

item.title: Demonizing Institutions and Normalizing the Unnormalized
item.description:
The modern left often portrays the state (or traditional institutions) as inherently oppressive or evil—e.g., “defund the police,” systemic racism baked into government, or viewing borders/national sovereignty as xenophobic. This demonization flips traditional good/evil: what was once normal (law enforcement, merit-based systems, national identity) becomes “oppressive,” while unchecked empathy or radical change becomes “justice.”

Examples include overusing “misogyny” and “transphobic” labels to shut down debate—e.g., calling concerns about women’s sports or biological definitions “hate speech” or “bigotry,” even when rooted in evidence or common sense. This creates a perverted moral framework where disagreement = evil, normalizing what was abnormal (e.g., rapid normalization of homosexuality as not just accepted but celebrated in ways that blend with fetishism or hypersexual culture).

item.title: Isn't That Offensive?
item.description:
Before wrapping up, let’s address the term head-on. When I describe certain strands of modern leftist idealism as an “infectious disease,” I’m not reaching for shock value or cheap rhetoric. I’m using the word in its precise, dictionary sense:

disease n. 2. a harmful development (as in a social institution) Example: sees the city’s crime as a disease.

infectious adj. 2. spreading or capable of spreading rapidly to others - an infectious laugh - Her happiness was infectious. — Merriam-Webster Dictionary https://www.merriam-webster.com/dictionary/infectious

item.title: Isn't That Offensive?
item.description:
Focus: Metaphor + historical roots + old-school liberalism contrast + Weimar warning + “This Is Only the First Level” segue. (Short opener.)

Key Content / Chapters:

  • Isn’t That Offensive? The Metaphor Dictionary definitions of “disease” (harmful development in a social institution) and “virus” (poisons mind/soul). Infective thinking spreads rapidly via empathy/utopia over reality, leading to stagnation and inversion. Effective thinking anchors in evidence, biology, tradition for real progress.
  • Has It Always Been Like This? Old-school (classical) liberalism meant individual rights, reason, free speech, merit, limited government — the effective foundation that built the modern world. Today’s version mutated into identity/emotion-first inversion. Ancient roots (Sodom/Gomorrah inverting justice/hospitality into predation; fertility cults with ritual sex/child sacrifice for “prosperity”) show recurring patterns. Weimar Germany parallels (degeneracy, institutional collapse) warn of backlash if unchecked. Not doomed to repeat, but repeating the conditions.
  • This Is Only the First Level This diagnoses the mind-virus hijacking minds and stagnating progress. Next essays examine symptoms (empathy/identity failure, moral inversion). Later: the distracted machinery (companies/institutions) behind it.

Cross-reference: “See Essay 2 for how it hijacks empathy into a depressed cult.”

item.title: Truth versus Ideals
item.description:
Focus: Truth/ideals metaphors + full vaccine antidote + ancient cults parallel + forced religion note. (Closes the series with solution.)

Key Content / Chapters:

  • Truth versus Ideals Plato’s Cave: shadows (feelings, self-ID, ideals) mistaken for reality; Left attacks sunlight (biology, evidence, tradition). Effective thinking escapes; infective thinking chains everyone. Pokémon Black and White: Reshiram (truth) vs. Zekrom (ideals) in conflict — the Left demands ideals as the only truth.
  • Religion as a Vaccine Ancient cults (Asherah ritual sex; Baal/Molech child sacrifice for “prosperity”) parallel modern one-night-stand culture + abortion-as-convenience. Biblical response restores moral order. In Snow Crash, a neuro-linguistic virus crashes minds like Sumerian programs. Juanita (after Jesuits) explains the brain’s immune system strengthens with exposure — traditional religion builds mental antibodies (humility, boundaries, evidence-based tradition) as the nam-shub counter-virus against fictions (fluid identity, affirmation over desistance, “better” non-bio parenting). Faith inoculates by anchoring reality over utopia. Forcing religion (or woke “everyone their own reality” cult) backfires and breeds resentment. Voluntary faith works; coercion strengthens the virus.

Cross-reference: “Building on the moral inversions in Essay 2 and empathy failures in the related essay below.”

item.title: Demonizing the State and Inverting Good and Evil
item.description:
Focus: Moral inversion + degeneracy/public spectacle + parenting claim + Avot diagnostic + Pride/Keep It Private. (Builds on Essay 1’s inversion theme.)

Key Content / Chapters:

  • Demonizing the State and Inverting Good and Evil Portrays normal institutions (police, borders, merit) as oppressive; unchecked empathy becomes “justice.” Labels (“transphobic,” “misogynist”) lose meaning and silence debate, normalizing the abnormal (hypersexual culture, fetish blending).
  • Mishnah Avot 5:19 – Moral Diagnostic Abraham’s traits (generous eye, humble spirit, meek soul) build and inherit. Balaam’s (evil eye, proud spirit, haughty soul) invert and descend. Modern infective thinking often embodies Balaam: zero-sum identity politics, utopian superiority over biology/tradition, boundless unrestrained empathy/pleasure.
  • We’re Evolving Just Backwards + Normalization of the Unnormalized Regression to animalistic behavior and hypersexuality detached from purpose. DEI as rebranded racism (merit → “supremacy,” quotas erode trust). Pride Parades turn private into mandatory public spectacle (haughty soul demanding affirmation). Torah on avera (forbidden acts, e.g., certain relations): high bar for public prosecution (two witnesses); private sin stays private, but public display spreads harm and risks desecration. At minimum, keep it private — the disease flips this into spectacle.
  • Pleasure Over Purpose “LGBT parents produce statistically better children” relies on small biased samples. Regnerus New Family Structures Study showed worse outcomes vs. intact biological mother-father homes. 2025 Cornell multiverse analysis (testing >2 million variations) confirmed in every model: kids fare worse or no better. Biological two-parent homes remain optimal per decades of evidence.

Cross-reference: “Essay 3 explores the empathy/identity roots feeding this inversion.”

item.title: Drone Swarm Project — Design Notes v3
item.description:
Overview#

A multi-functional drone swarm system built around two drone types:

  • Async drones — full sensor suite, independent AI capable, worn on a belt, used for personal recon, surveillance, podcasting, forensics, dark environments, pointing/scanning tasks, and WiFi through-wall sensing.
  • Sync drones — stripped-down vision-first design, centrally coordinated, stored in a suitcase, used for formations, light shows, multi-angle filming, perimeter coverage, group recon, and distributed WiFi sensing meshes.

Both fleets connect to a central computer backpack worn by the operator. A head-mounted display (HMD) shows drone feeds and controls. Motion gloves allow precision manual control of any individual drone. Solar panels on the suitcase, backpack, and belt extend field endurance without access to shore power.

item.title: Drone Swarm Project — Design Notes v2
item.description:
Overview#

A multi-functional drone swarm system built around two drone types:

  • Async drones — full sensor suite, independent AI capable, worn on a belt, used for personal recon, podcasting, forensics, dark environments, and pointing/scanning tasks.
  • Sync drones — stripped-down vision-first design, centrally coordinated, stored in a suitcase, used for formations, light shows, multi-angle filming, perimeter coverage, and group recon.

Both fleets connect to a central computer backpack worn by the operator. A head-mounted display (HMD) shows drone feeds and controls. Motion gloves allow precision manual control of any individual drone.

item.title: Isn't That Offensive?
item.description:
Bullet points (Remove These when intergrated):

  • The Talmud is also not Jewish law but more similar to reddit
  • Jewdism does not allow wounding of genitalia or castration
  • make “The Depressed Cult and Suicidal Empathy” it’s own chapter or reference it a little bit and find a good source to “relay the viewer” to Before wrapping up, let’s address the term head-on. When I describe certain strands of modern leftist idealism as an “infectious disease,” I’m not reaching for shock value or cheap rhetoric. I’m using the word in its precise, dictionary sense:

disease n. 2. a harmful development (as in a social institution) Example: sees the city’s crime as a disease.

item.title: Isn't That Offensive?
item.description:
Bullet points (Remove These when intergrated):

  • Religion as a vaccine (tied to Snow Crash with the Juanita/Jesuits immune-system analogy and nam-shub counter-virus).

  • Talmud “six genders” clarification (as edge-case halakhic biology for rare physiological anomalies like intersex conditions, not modern identity politics or self-ID; contrasts with the binary Torah framework and cross-dressing prohibition) surprisingly most secular (and some orthodox, conservative) jews don’t even know about.

  • “1% transgender” as misrepresented (pre-2010s ~0.01%; recent adult ~0.8-1%, but youth surge to 3%+ then reversal/decline; social contagion/ROGD context).

item.title: Isn't That Offensive?
item.description:
Bullet points:

  • Religion as a vaccine (tied to Snow Crash with the Juanita/Jesuits immune-system analogy and nam-shub counter-virus).

  • Talmud “six genders” clarification (as edge-case halakhic biology for rare physiological anomalies like intersex conditions, not modern identity politics or self-ID; contrasts with the binary Torah framework and cross-dressing prohibition).

  • “1% transgender” as misrepresented (pre-2010s ~0.01%; recent adult ~0.8-1%, but youth surge to 3%+ then reversal/decline; social contagion/ROGD context).

  • “LGBT parental partnerships make statistically better children” counter (Regnerus NFSS + 2025 Cornell multiverse analysis: intact biological mother-father homes optimal; no “better” outcomes, often worse across models).

item.title: Sphere Controller — Setup Guide
item.description:
Block Diagram#

![Pasted image 20260323163455](Pasted image 20260323163455.png)

Wiring# 

Pico GPIO 4 (SDA) ──┬── MPU6050 SDA
                    └── SSD1306 SDA

Pico GPIO 5 (SCL) ──┬── MPU6050 SCL
                    └── SSD1306 SCL

Pico 3V3 ───────────┬── MPU6050 VCC
                    └── SSD1306 VCC

Pico GND ───────────┬── MPU6050 GND
                    └── SSD1306 GND
                    └── All button commons

GPIO 14 ── ORBIT button ── GND
GPIO 15 ── PAN   button ── GND
GPIO 16 ── HOME  button ── GND
GPIO 17 ── MODE  button ── GND

Note: leave XDA and XCL unconnected
Need to fix “attack_hitbox” flipping.

item.title: Welcome
item.description:
This is your new vault.

Make a note of something, [[create a link]], or try the Importer!

When you’re ready, delete this note and make the vault your own.
